result:
**Goal: Add a First-Person 3D Ray Caster mode (Shift+V) that lets you walk through the mazes generated by the existing Maze mode.**

This would render an ASCII/Unicode first-person perspective view — like a terminal Wolfenstein 3D — using ray casting to project walls with distance-based shading. It leverages the existing `MazeWorld` maze generation code and adds an entirely new rendering paradigm (3D perspective) to what has been exclusively 2D top-down. Players could navigate with arrow keys, see walls recede into the distance with gradient shading, and optionally toggle a minimap overlay showing their position. This would be both a technical showpiece and a natural extension of the maze solver already in the project.
